analysis.reasoning: The tweet highlights ongoing EU-level coordination on COVID-19 (meeting regularly, 'common fight') which signals EU unity (EU2). It also emphasizes actions that benefit citizens (testing, securing vaccines), aligning with EU3's focus on tangible benefits to people. It does not clearly fit EU1 (historical success), EU4 (avant-garde regulatory leadership beyond health), EU5 (global champion of fair causes), or EU6 (global development/peace).
